# Agency Dashboard — First-Principles Architecture Breakdown

*Generated by Opus from AGENCY_DASHBOARD_SPEC_V2.md — 2026-04-13*

---

## SECTION 1: DASHBOARD MAP

### 1. Agency Dashboard (Owner/Partner View)
- **Who sees it:** Owner (Raph), Partners (Shaan, Alex, Scott), Marketing Manager (minus financials)
- **Data inputs:** Revenue data (Google Sheets), staff shift data, model roster data, social analytics aggregates, PTP submissions, webcam stats
- **Data outputs:** Approval decisions (PTP), shift schedules, role assignments, recruitment pipeline entries
- **Dependencies:** Content Gen Dashboard (feeds R&D table, PTP queue), Model Dashboard (content uploads, webcam stats), Google Sheets (financials), Google Drive (file storage)

| View | Data Inputs | Data Outputs |
|------|-------------|--------------|
| Dashboard Home | KPIs from all sections, staff online status | None (read-only summary) |
| Revenue & ROI Analytics | Google Sheets (P&L, payroll, costs), staff cost data | None (read-only, CEO manual fill) |
| Social Analytics | Instagram API, Twitter API, all platform APIs, content performance data | Content performance tags → R&D table, replication triggers → Content Gen |
| Content Scheduler | PTP-approved reels, Meta API (25-slot queue), caption/text metadata | Scheduled posts → Meta API, slot availability signals |
| PTP Approval | Editor-uploaded reels + AI metadata, version history | Approve → Scheduler + recommended date; Reject → Editor notification |
| Webcam Stats | 17 streaming platform APIs, shift/schedule data, earnings | None (read-only, live stream embed) |
| Shift Tracker | Clock-in/out events, payroll rules | Deduction calculations → Billings, lateness alerts → seniors |
| Shift Schedule | Staff availability, shift assignments | Schedule assignments, day-off records |
| Models Roster | Model profiles, earnings, content schedules, analytics | None (read-only aggregate) |
| Billings | Google Sheets (financial data) | TBD |
| Settings | User preferences | Language, timezone, role config |

### 2. Content Gen Dashboard (Editor View)
- **Who sees it:** Editors (IG Editors x2, OF Editor x1)
- **Data inputs:** Raw content from models (via Google Drive), R&D table entries, PTP rejection notifications, SISO database (reference reels), Google Gemini AI analysis
- **Data outputs:** Finished reels + AI metadata → PTP queue, R&D table entries, content stored to Google Drive + dashboard storage
- **Dependencies:** Model Dashboard (raw content uploads), Agency Dashboard (PTP decisions, analytics feeding R&D), Google Drive (file storage), Google Gemini (AI analysis)

| View | Data Inputs | Data Outputs |
|------|-------------|--------------|
| Raw Content Queue | Model uploads (Google Drive), PTP rejections flagged "needs tweaking" | Assignment to editor |
| Ideas Lab | Video input, niche/theme toggles, Google Gemini analysis | Suggested hooks, on-screen text, CapCut tips |
| Search & Suggest | SISO database (reels by niche/theme/category) | Reference reel selections |
| Finished Reels / Edited Section | Editor's completed work, AI auto-review (caption, text, description) | Reel + metadata → PTP, file → Google Drive + dashboard storage |
| PTP Status (Editor perspective) | PTP approval/rejection status per reel | Re-edit trigger on rejection |

### 3. Model Dashboard (Mobile-First)
- **Who sees it:** Models (Ella, Amam, Ren, Tyler, Kiroko)
- **Data inputs:** Content requests from marketing, swipe deck suggestions, earnings data, webcam platform data, gamification points
- **Data outputs:** Raw content uploads → Google Drive → Editor Queue, swipe-right saves → personal queue, webcam stream data → platform APIs
- **Dependencies:** Agency Dashboard (content requests), Content Gen Dashboard (swipe deck feed), Google Drive, 17 webcam platforms, OBS

| View | Data Inputs | Data Outputs |
|------|-------------|--------------|
| Webcam Home/Go Live | Last week stats, streaming schedule, stream keys | Go-live signal → platforms via OBS, post-stream summary → manager |
| Webcam Statistics | Historical streaming data from 17 platforms | None (read-only) |
| Webcam Calendar | Streaming schedule | None (read-only) |
| Social Analytics (simplified) | Same data as owner, filtered to own accounts | None (read-only) |
| Content Requests | Briefs from marketing (video clip + instructions + tips) | Recorded video → Google Drive (auto-labeled) |
| Earnings | OnlyFans + Fans.ly revenue data | None (read-only) |
| Swipe Deck | Content suggestions from pipeline + agency DB | Swipe-right → personal queue, swipe-up → camera → upload, swipe-left → algorithm training |

### 4. Chat Dashboard (Chatter View) — DEFERRED

### 5. Public Landing Page — DEFERRED

---

## SECTION 2: DATA FLOW

### Content Pipeline (Primary Loop)
```
Social Platforms → analytics data → Agency: Social Analytics
Agency: Social Analytics → performance insights → Content Gen: R&D Table
Content Gen: R&D Table → approved briefs → Agency: Content Requests
Agency: Content Requests → briefs → Model: Content Requests
Model: Content Requests → raw video → Google Drive
Google Drive → notification → Content Gen: Raw Content Queue
Content Gen: Raw Content Queue → edited reel + AI metadata → Finished Reels
Content Gen: Finished Reels → reel + metadata → Agency: PTP Approval
Agency: PTP Approval → approved reel + date → Agency: Content Scheduler
Agency: Content Scheduler → scheduled post → Meta API (25-slot drip)
Meta API → posted content → Social Platforms → analytics → LOOP CLOSES
```

### PTP Rejection Loop
```
PTP Approval → rejection → Notification → Editor
Editor → PTP Status (flagged "needs tweaking") → Raw Content Queue
Raw Content Queue → re-edit → Finished Reels (V2/V3...) → PTP again
```

### Model Swipe Deck Shortcut
```
Pipeline + Agency DB → suggestions → Model: Swipe Deck
Swipe-right → personal queue (NO approval)
Swipe-up → camera → raw video → Google Drive → Editor Queue
Swipe-left → discard → recommendation algorithm
```

### Financial Data Flow
```
Google Sheets → revenue, payroll, costs → Agency: Revenue & ROI
Google Sheets → model earnings splits → Model: Earnings
Shift Tracker → deductions → Billings
OnlyFans/Fans.ly APIs → earnings → Model: Earnings
```

### Webcam Data Flow
```
17 Platforms → stats, earnings → Model: Webcam Statistics
Model → Go Live → OBS → stream keys → 17 Platforms
Model → post-stream summary → Agency: Webcam Stats
Agency: Webcam Stats ← live stream embed ← Platforms
```

### Cross-Dashboard Data Junctions

| Junction Point | Source | Data Type | Destinations |
|---------------|--------|-----------|--------------|
| R&D Table | Social Analytics, Editor Ideas, Model Swipe-rights | Content ideas + reference reels | Content Requests, Editor Queue |
| PTP Queue | Editor Finished Reels | Reel + AI metadata + versions | Owner PTP Approval, Editor PTP Status |
| Google Drive | Model uploads, Editor uploads | Raw + finished video files | Editor Queue, Scheduler, Model folders |
| Model Roster | All dashboards | Model profile, earnings, analytics | Owner Roster, Model Earnings, Content Requests |
| Staff Online Status | Shift Tracker, Schedule | Clock-in/out, schedule | Dashboard Home |
| Content Performance Tags | Social Analytics | Post performance data | R&D Table entries (auto-tagged) |
| Gamification Points | Model actions | Point values | Model Dashboard, Leaderboard |

## SECTION 3: SHARED COMPONENTS

| # | Component | Used In |
|---|-----------|---------|
| 1 | **Model Selector / Filter** | Agency Social Analytics, Scheduler, PTP, Webcam Stats, Roster, Content Gen (all views) |
| 2 | **Platform/Account Tabs** | Agency Social Analytics, Model Social Analytics, Webcam Stats, Model Earnings |
| 3 | **Calendar (Daily/Weekly/Monthly)** | Content Scheduler, Shift Schedule, Webcam Calendar, Model "My Week" |
| 4 | **Notification Bell** | ALL dashboards — 3-tier severity routing |
| 5 | **PTP Reel Viewer + Controls** | Agency PTP Approval, Editor PTP Status |
| 6 | **Video Player / Reel Preview** | PTP, Social Analytics, Ideas Lab, Finished Reels, Raw Content Queue, Swipe Deck |
| 7 | **In-App Camera / Recorder** | Model Content Requests (one-tap), Model Swipe Deck (swipe-up) |
| 8 | **Analytics KPI Cards** | Dashboard Home, Revenue & ROI, Social Analytics, Model Analytics, Earnings, Webcam Home |
| 9 | **Staff Online Status** | Dashboard Home, Shift Tracker, Shift Schedule |
| 10 | **Niche/Category Tags** | Ideas Lab, Search & Suggest, Finished Reels, PTP, Swipe Deck |
| 11 | **Version History Tracker** | PTP Approval, Finished Reels, PTP Status |
| 12 | **Gamification Points Display** | Model Content Requests, Swipe Deck, Webcam (streak), Earnings |
| 13 | **Shift/Time Display** | Shift Tracker, Shift Schedule, Dashboard Home |
| 14 | **Google Drive Uploader** | Model Content Requests, Finished Reels, Raw Content Queue |

---

## SECTION 4: DATA ENTITIES

### 1. User
- **Fields:** id, name, email, photo, roles[], primaryRole, timezone, language, onlineStatus, lastActive, createdAt
- **Relationships:** Has many Roles; (if model) has many ModelAccounts; (if editor) has many EditedReels; has many ShiftRecords
- **Read/Write:** All dashboards (auth + presence) / Owner (role management)

### 2. Role
- **Fields:** id, name, permissions[] (route x action matrix)
- **Read/Write:** Auth layer / Owner only

### 3. Model
- **Fields:** id, userId, name, niches[], status, earningsSplit, nextContentDueDate, profilePhoto, createdAt
- **Relationships:** Has many SocialAccounts, ContentRequests, Reels, WebcamSessions, EarningsRecords, SwipeDeckItems
- **Read:** Agency (Roster, Analytics, PTP, Scheduler, Webcam), Content Gen (all), Model (own data)

### 4. SocialAccount
- **Fields:** id, modelId, platform (instagram/twitter/other), handle, accessToken, followerCount, lastSyncedAt
- **Relationships:** Belongs to Model; has many Posts, AnalyticsSnapshots

### 5. Post
- **Fields:** id, socialAccountId, platform, postType, caption, onScreenText, mediaUrl, publishedAt, scheduledAt, impressions, likes, comments, shares, saves, engagementRate, performanceTags[]
- **Relationships:** Belongs to SocialAccount; may link to Reel

### 6. RDEntry (R&D Table)
- **Fields:** id, modelId, niche, theme, category, description, referenceReelUrl, status (proposed/approved/assigned/completed), approvedBy, source (editor_sunday/analytics/model_swipe), performanceTags[], createdAt

### 7. ContentRequest
- **Fields:** id, modelId, rdEntryId, briefVideoUrl, instructions, tips, deadline, status (sent/acknowledged/in_progress/uploaded/overdue), sentAt, uploadedAt, googleDriveFileId

### 8. Reel (Edited Content)
- **Fields:** id, editorUserId, modelId, niche, category, title, description, captionAI, onScreenTextAI, mediaUrl, googleDriveUrl, version (V1/V2/V3...), parentReelId, ptpStatus, rejectionNote, scheduledDate, editTimeSeconds, createdAt

### 9. ScheduledPost
- **Fields:** id, reelId, socialAccountId, scheduledAt, metaSlotPosition (1-25), status (queued/scheduled_meta/posted/failed), postedAt

### 10. WebcamSession
- **Fields:** id, modelId, platform, startedAt, endedAt, duration, viewerCount, peakViewers, earnings, streamKeyUsed

### 11. WebcamPlatform
- **Fields:** id, name, apiEndpoint, authMethod, streamKeyFormat, isAdult, region

### 12. ShiftRecord
- **Fields:** id, userId, scheduledStart, scheduledEnd, actualStart, actualEnd, status (on_time/late/absent/early), latenessMinutes, deductionAmount, notes

### 13. ShiftSchedule
- **Fields:** id, userId, date, startTime, endTime, isDayOff, createdBy

### 14. EarningsRecord
- **Fields:** id, modelId, platform, amount, currency, period, contentType, recordedAt

### 15. Notification
- **Fields:** id, recipientUserId, type, severity (high/medium/low), channel (in_app/push/telegram), title, body, linkTo, isRead, sentAt, readAt

### 16. GamificationEvent
- **Fields:** id, modelId, action (swipe/upload/submit_early/streak/challenge), points, metadata, createdAt

### 17. SwipeDeckItem
- **Fields:** id, modelId, sourceType, contentUrl, niche, theme, action (saved/make_now/discarded/pending), savedAt

### 18. FinancialRecord (Google Sheets mirror)
- **Fields:** id, category, department, staffUserId, amount, period, source (sheets_sync/manual), syncedAt

---

## SECTION 5: BUILD ORDER

### TIER 0: Build NOW (no external dependencies)
1. Auth + Role System
2. Agency Dashboard Home (placeholder KPIs)
3. Models Roster (CRUD, model detail page)
4. R&D Table (Airtable-clone + graph view)
5. Ideas Lab (theme/niche selector, CapCut tips, stub AI)
6. Search & Suggest (SISO database search)
7. PTP Pipeline (upload, version chain, approve/reject)
8. Raw Content Queue (kanban, "needs tweaking" flags)
9. Finished Reels (upload, categorize, AI metadata stub)
10. Notification System (in-app first)
11. Layout Shells + Role-based routing

### TIER 1: After Tier 0 + lightweight integrations
12. Social Analytics (Instagram) — needs Meta API credentials
13. Content Scheduler — needs Meta API for scheduling
14. Social Analytics (Twitter + others) — additional API keys
15. Model: Social Analytics (simplified) — depends on #12
16. Model: Content Requests — depends on R&D + PTP
17. Model: Swipe Deck — depends on R&D + Content Gen pipeline
18. Model: Earnings (stub) — manual data entry
19. Gamification System — needs point values (can stub defaults)
20. Notifications: Push + Telegram

### TIER 2: BLOCKED — Waiting on Shaan
| Feature | Blocked By | Can Stub? |
|---------|-----------|-----------|
| Webcam (all 3 sub-views) | Webcam docs: platforms, APIs, OBS | NO |
| Revenue & ROI Analytics | Google Sheets schema | YES (mock data) |
| Billings | Google Sheets schema | YES (shell) |
| Shift Tracker | Shaan's time button code | PARTIAL |
| Shift Schedule | Shift Tracker dependency | PARTIAL |
| Google Drive auto-upload | Folder structure walkthrough | YES (stub destination) |
| Gemini video analysis | API key + prompt engineering | PARTIAL (stub AI) |
| Model Earnings (real) | OF/Fans.ly API or Sheets | YES (mock data) |

### TIER 3: DEFERRED
- Chat Dashboard, General Admin, Recruitment, Onboarding, Landing Page, 5th dashboard

### Critical Path
```
Auth + Roles → Layout Shells → Models Roster → R&D Table → PTP Pipeline
                                                    │              │
                                                    ▼              ▼
                                              Content Requests  Content Scheduler
                                                    │              │
                                                    ▼              ▼
                                              Model Uploads    Social Analytics
                                                    │              │
                                                    ▼              ▼
                                              Raw Content Queue  Swipe Deck
                                                    │
                                                    ▼
                                              Finished Reels → PTP → Scheduler
                                                                       │
                                                                       ▼
                                                                 Full Loop Closed
```

---

## SECTION 6: COMPETITOR RESEARCH PLAN

### Content Scheduling UX
| Competitor | Study For |
|-----------|-----------|
| **Later.com** | Calendar UI, drag-and-drop, multi-account, visual planner, auto-publish queue |
| **Buffer** | Queue system, slot-based auto-scheduling, analytics-to-scheduling feedback |
| **Hootsuite** | Multi-platform management, team approval workflows, bulk scheduling |
| **Metricool** | Combined analytics + scheduling in one tool |
| **Planoly** | Visual grid planner for Instagram, story scheduling |

### PTP / Content Approval
| Competitor | Study For |
|-----------|-----------|
| **Frame.io** | Video review + approval, version tracking V1/V2/V3, batch review |
| **Filestage** | Multi-stage approval, reviewer roles, approval routing |
| **monday.com** | Kanban approval views, status columns, notification triggers |

### R&D Table / Content Database
| Competitor | Study For |
|-----------|-----------|
| **Airtable** | Table + grid view, linked records, filtering, gallery view |
| **Notion databases** | Multi-view on same dataset (table/board/gallery/calendar) |

### Swipe Deck / Content Discovery
| Competitor | Study For |
|-----------|-----------|
| **TikTok** | Feed algorithm, swipe interaction, "For You" curation |
| **Tinder** | Card-stack swipe UX, gesture physics, celebration screens |
| **Pinterest** | Discovery by niche, save-to-board, visual browsing |

### Model Dashboard / Gamification
| Competitor | Study For |
|-----------|-----------|
| **Duolingo** | Streaks, XP, leaderboards, daily targets, celebrations |
| **Habitica** | Task-based gamification, reward tiers, streak mechanics |
| **Strava** | Activity tracking, personal bests, weekly summaries |

### Webcam / Streaming
| Competitor | Study For |
|-----------|-----------|
| **Streamlabs** | OBS integration, multi-platform streaming, stream key management |
| **Restream.io** | Multi-platform simultaneous streaming, unified analytics |
| **Chaturbate** | Model-facing dashboard, earnings display, schedule patterns |

### Shift Tracking / Team Management
| Competitor | Study For |
|-----------|-----------|
| **Deputy** | Shift scheduling, clock-in/out, lateness tracking, payroll integration |
| **When I Work** | Employee scheduling, shift swapping, availability |
| **Toggl Track** | Time tracking per task, capacity planning |

### Revenue / Analytics
| Competitor | Study For |
|-----------|-----------|
| **Baremetrics** | Revenue dashboards, trend lines, staff cost analysis |
| **Chartmogul** | Revenue by segment breakdown |
| **Geckoboard** | KPI dashboards, widget-based layout, "view from afar" |

### Notifications
| Competitor | Study For |
|-----------|-----------|
| **Slack** | Multi-channel routing, severity-based, digest mode |
| **Linear** | Clean notification UX, inbox zero pattern |
